items.title: A-List: FIFA's top-4 make WC semis for first time
items.summary: Argentina, Spain, France and England went into the tournament as the top four in FIFA's rankings and are two wins away from being crowned champions again.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Wimbledon crowd 'played big part' in me reaching final - Zverev
items.summary: After his defeat to Jannik Sinner, Alexander Zverev reflected on how the Wimbledon crowd "played a big part" in his journey to the final.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
